message:
refactor(daemon): use FIFO reader for VM metrics instead of GET /metrics

Replace the polling-based metrics collection with per-VM FIFO readers:
- MetricsPoller now manages MetricsFIFOReader instances per task
- Add StartTaskMetrics/StopTaskMetrics methods for lifecycle management
- Integrate with task lifecycle (CreateTask, RestartTask, StopTask, etc.)
- Simplify CPU calculation (removed per-vcpu normalization)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
